headlines.snippet: The White House denied a split between the two officials who have historically held diverging foreign policy positions.

headlines.title: ‘Tit-for-tat US-Iran attacks appear to be over’
headlines.snippet: Recent US-Iran military exchanges appear to have concluded, according to former US Ambassador to Oman Richard Schmierer. He stated that these recent exchanges seem to have run their course.

headlines.title: Russia-Ukraine war: Why has Putin rejected limits on long-range strikes?
headlines.snippet: Russia's president claims that Ukraine proposed limits on long-range strikes, which Russia has rejected. This comes as Ukraine has increased attacks on Russia's energy sector.

headlines.title: Qatar condemns Israeli incursion in southern Syria
headlines.snippet: Qatar has condemned an Israeli incursion in southern Syria, specifically in Quneitra and Deraa. Qatar's Foreign Ministry called it a violation of Syria's sovereignty and international law.

headlines.title: Israeli strike in central Gaza kills three Palestinians, including a child
headlines.snippet: An Israeli drone strike in central Gaza killed three Palestinians, including a child, and injured several others. The strike occurred on al-Baraka Street in Deir el-Balah.

headlines.title: Iran says technical meetings under MoU not scheduled this week
headlines.snippet: Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister stated that technical working group meetings under the Iran-US memorandum of understanding are not scheduled for this week. Consultations with Qatar regarding US commitments are ongoing.

headlines.title: Israel uproots hundreds of West Bank olive trees amid fears of wider destruction
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces bulldozed at least 500 olive trees in Zububa village near Jenin in the occupied West Bank. Hundreds more trees are at risk of destruction.

headlines.title: Azerbaijan issues rare rebuke against key ally Israel over Armenian genocide recognition
headlines.snippet: Azerbaijan has issued a rare rebuke against its ally Israel for formally recognizing the Armenian genocide. Azerbaijan's Foreign Ministry called the decision a 'distortion of historical facts'.

headlines.snippet: Saudi Arabia has condemned Israeli incursions into Syrian territories. The condemnation was issued in response to Israeli actions in southern Syria.

headlines.title: Iran says held first meeting with Oman on managing Hormuz
headlines.snippet: Iran and Oman have held their first meeting of a joint committee focused on managing the Strait of Hormuz. Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi announced the meeting.

headlines.title: Hezbollah-allied Lebanese parliament head says US-Israel-Lebanon deal ‘will not pass’
